rotor_speed_bands.title: MEMORY AID — ROTOR SPEED RANGES
rotor_speed_bands.hook: Power ON: tight band — engine controls RPM. Power OFF: wider band — you control it with collective.

carb_ice.title: MEMORY AID — CARB ICE CAUTION ZONE
carb_ice.hook: "Teens plus a couple" — the danger zone lives in the comfortable teens (11–21°C). Nice weather outside, ice forming inside the carb. Apply carb heat immediately if icing suspected.

letters.detail: No aerobatic maneuvers of any kind
No pushovers — catastrophic loss of control
No throttle closure with cabin heat ON
Right seat only for solo flight
